sections.heading: Capability Summary
sections.text: For 2026-W29, mean is 0.22 sccm, maximum 0.28 sccm, P95 0.27 sccm and Cpk 1.08.

sections.heading: Observed Population
sections.text: The governed weekly aggregation contains 2400 synthetic demo measurements from OP30 on M220.

sections.heading: Comparison Baseline
sections.text: The governed process center baseline is 0.20 sccm. This is an internal process baseline, not the product target or USL.
